parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description: The account address (can also be a name hash)

parameters.name: owned_only
parameters.description: Indicate to filter only activities initiated by the account

parameters.name: type
parameters.description:
Filter by activity type. Supported values:
 * `transactions` - Transactions containing the account in any of the transaction fields
 * `aexn` - AExN (aex9 and aex141) activities
 * `aex9` - AEx9 activities
 * `aex141` - AEx141 activities
 * `contract` - Internal and external contract calls
 * `transfers` - Internal (both gen-based and tx-based) transfers
 * `claims` - Name claims related to the name hash
 * `swaps` - Dex swaps related to the name hash

get.description: Get AEX141 contracts sorted by creation time, name or symbol.

parameters.description: meta info field used on sorting
parameters.name: by

parameters.description: Sorts by name or symbol prefix, this is decided by the 'by' field. If it's name, it will sort by name prefix, if it's symbol, it will sort by symbol prefix.
parameters.name: prefix

parameters.description: Gets AEX141 contracts with exact name or symbol, this is decided by the 'by' field. If it's name, it will get contracts with exact name, if it's symbol, it will get contracts with exact symbol.
parameters.name: exact
